events.text: Substitution, Croatia. Ante Budimir replaces Petar Musa.
Substitution, Croatia. Andrej Kramaric replaces Josko Gvardiol.
Goal! Panama 0, Croatia 1. Ante Budimir (Croatia) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Josip Stanisic with a cross.
Yoel Bárcenas (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Croatia. Luka Sucic replaces Marco Pasalic.
Substitution, Croatia. Petar Sucic replaces Mateo Kovacic.
Substitution, Panama. Cecilio Waterman replaces Jiovany Ramos.
Substitution, Croatia. Mario Pasalic replaces Luka Modric.
Substitution, Panama. Azarías Londoño replaces José Fajardo.
Substitution, Panama. Éric Davis replaces César Blackman.
Substitution, Panama. Tomás Rodríguez replaces Yoel Bárcenas.
Petar Sucic (Croatia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
